name: edwards
description: 仿全明星街球派对：14px 黑字 + 1px 字间距 + 行高 2 + 22px 内边距 + 红字加粗强调。支持互动板块、图片网格、红色分割线。

source.title: 率群狼，缓称王！爱德华兹：兑现三分天赋又何妨
source.author: 全明星街球派对

image.img_style: max-width: 100%; height: auto; display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle;

inline.code_style: background: #f4f4f4; padding: 1px 6px; border-radius: 3px; font-family: Consolas, Monaco, monospace; font-size: 13px; color: #ba0808;

code_block_style: margin: 12px 0; padding: 12px 14px; background: #2d2d2d; color: #f8f8f2; font-family: Consolas, Monaco, monospace; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.6; border-radius: 4px; overflow-x: auto;

grid.title_style: margin: 5px 0 0; text-align: center; font-size: 13px; color: #222; font-weight: bold;

article_wrapper_style: font-size: 14px; color: #212121; letter-spacing: 1px; line-height: 2; padding: 0 22px; text-align: justify; font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'PingFang SC', 'Hiragino Sans GB', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif;
